name: Quiz Generator
description: Generate interactive quizzes from your Alt notes, then grade your answers.
author: Alt

ko.name: 퀴즈 생성기
ko.description: Alt 노트로 대화형 퀴즈를 만들고 답안을 채점하세요.

de.name: Quiz-Generator
de.description: Erstelle interaktive Quizze aus deinen Alt-Notizen und bewerte deine Antworten.

marketplace.longDescription: Turn any note into a study session. Quiz Generator reads your selected Alt notes and creates multiple-choice, true/false, and short-answer questions, grades your responses, and explains the answers. Everything runs through Alt's built-in AI — no extra setup, no API keys.

ko.longDescription: 노트를 학습 세션으로 바꿔보세요. 퀴즈 생성기는 선택한 Alt 노트를 읽어 객관식, 참/거짓, 단답형 문제를 만들고, 답안을 채점한 뒤 해설을 제공합니다. 모든 과정은 Alt 내장 AI로 실행되며 별도 설정이나 API 키가 필요 없습니다.

de.longDescription: Verwandle jede Notiz in eine Lernsession. Der Quiz-Generator liest deine ausgewählten Alt-Notizen, erstellt Multiple-Choice-, Wahr/Falsch- und Kurzantwortfragen, bewertet deine Antworten und erklärt sie. Alles läuft über die in Alt integrierte KI — ohne zusätzliche Einrichtung und ohne API-Schlüssel.
